videos.headline: Keon Coleman goes up for sensational 1-handed catch
videos.description: Keon Coleman gets Florida State into Syracuse territory with a miraculous one-handed catch.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Keon Coleman goes up for sensational 1-handed catch) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan Travis plows into end zone for TD on opening drive
videos.description: Jordan Travis keeps it for a 2-yard FSU touchdown early in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Travis plows into end zone for TD on opening drive) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Syracuse's LeQuint Allen steamrolls FSU defenders for a first down
videos.description: LeQuint Allen gets the first down for Syracuse as he stiff-arms one defender, then bowls over another.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Syracuse's LeQuint Allen steamrolls FSU defenders for a first down) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan Travis goes long to Keon Coleman for a 58-yard TD
videos.description: Florida State goes up two scores as Jordan Travis goes long to a wide-open Keon Coleman for a 58-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Travis goes long to Keon Coleman for a 58-yard TD) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida State picks up the fumble after sacking Syracuse's QB
videos.description: Florida State gets the ball back as Garrett Shrader is sacked and loses the football, resulting in a fumble.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida State picks up the fumble after sacking Syracuse's QB) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan Travis shaken up after taking a huge hit from behind
videos.description: Jordan Travis gets rocked by Syracuse's Kevin Jobity Jr. and seems to pick up an injury.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Travis shaken up after taking a huge hit from behind) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan Travis keeps it for easy FSU TD
videos.description: Jordan Travis gets his second rushing touchdown of the game as he keeps it for a 2-yard score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Travis keeps it for easy FSU TD) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Keon Coleman makes multiple people miss on 72-yard punt return
videos.description: Keon Coleman gets Florida State to the 9-yard line as he goes through multiple tackles for a 72-yard punt return.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Keon Coleman makes multiple people miss on 72-yard punt return) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Lawrance Toafili takes off for 50-yard FSU TD
videos.description: Florida State goes up 34-3 as Lawrance Toafili goes down the sideline for a 50-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Lawrance Toafili takes off for 50-yard FSU TD) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Hykeem Williams speeds away for 44-yard FSU TD
videos.description: Hykeem Williams hauls in the screen pass, makes a few men miss and scores the 44-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Hykeem Williams speeds away for 44-yard FSU TD) 2023/10/14 ESHEET
